Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Baldezar Kern]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Baldezar Kern destroyed the armies of the South Sea Revolution.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Kern has been vague.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Kern is the Head of the Champion’s Guild.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Baldezar Kern is the Head of the Champion’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Kern is a character who laces his fingers together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Baldezar Kern is a man who singlehandedly sunk an entire fleet of rebel ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Baldezar Kern has a son named Torrence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Baldezar Kern is one of the three people proposed to attend a meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Baldezar Kern is waiting at Calder's left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Kern is referred to as Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Kern's full name is Baldezar Kern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Baldezar Kern's armor began to crack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr punched Baldezar Kern through the floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Kern was hammered through the floor by a force comparable to a Great Elder's fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Baldezar Kern's blow was strong enough to stagger a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Baldezar Kern is a Champion who was severely wounded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Calder misses Kern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Kern is a person whose death occurred during the debacle in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Kern is someone Tyria mentions as a comparison for how they might die.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The cavalry saber is spotted with the blood of Baldezar Kern.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Kern is considered dangerous even without his Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Baldezar Kern is a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Baldezar Kern is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Kern is capable of stopping the Head alchemist with relative ease.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Kern is an armored individual flanking Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Baldezar Kern is a calm individual who compares the current situation to being locked in a burning house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Kern's name is Baldezar Kern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Kern is a Soulbound whose power allows him to enter an unstoppable berserk state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Baldezar Kern's Soulbound power is the ability to enter an unstoppable berserk state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Baldezar Kern fights using two maces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Baldezar Kern was a legend and a Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Baldezar Kern is a notable Guild Head in terms of ability.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
